summary: Frontend testing for admin portal changes - ALL 5 TESTS PASSED. Tested attachment section visibility, popup flow after Add to Quote, green Generate Quote button, and success popup.
critical_code_review_comments: Attachments section properly renders for both admin and customer (lines 1224-1270 in calculator.tsx)
Quote popup (showQuotePopup) correctly shows Add More and Generate Quote buttons
Generate Quote button uses rfqSubmitButtonGreen style with #4CAF50 background
Quote success popup (showQuoteSuccessPopup) displays 'Quote Generated!' message
Admin correctly sees prices in calculator results (isCustomer=false check working)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin portal changes are verified working: 1) Attachments (Optional) section visible between Freight and Calculate Price button, 2) After Calculate Price -> Add to Quote, popup shows 'Add More' and 'Generate Quote' buttons, 3) Generate Quote button is green (#4CAF50), 4) Clicking Generate Quote shows success popup with 'Quote Generated!' text, 5) Admin sees prices throughout the flow. Note: Expo service needed restart during testing for UI changes to reflect - may need restart if changes don't appear.

test_1_attachments_section.details: ATTACHMENTS (OPTIONAL) section visible between FREIGHT (OPTIONAL) and Calculate Price button with Camera, Gallery, and File buttons

test_2_popup_buttons.details: After clicking Add to Quote, popup shows 'Item Added!' with 'Add More' and 'Generate Quote' buttons

test_3_green_button.details: Generate Quote button background color is rgb(76, 175, 80) which equals #4CAF50 (green)

test_4_success_popup.details: After clicking Generate Quote, success popup shows 'Quote Generated!' with quote number Q/25-26/0028

test_5_prices_visible.details: Admin sees prices throughout - popup shows 'Total: Rs. 2269.97' and prices visible in calculator results

screenshots: /app/.screenshots/admin_before_calc.png - Shows Attachments section, Camera/Gallery/File buttons, Calculate Price button
/app/.screenshots/admin_popup.png - Shows 'Item Added!' popup with Add More and green Generate Quote buttons
/app/.screenshots/admin_success_popup.png - Shows 'Quote Generated!' success popup with quote number
